decisions.context: Coordination state (claims, path reservations, fan-out groups) is stored in in-memory Maps
decisions.decision: Keep coordination state session-local and in-memory
rationale: Coordination is gated behind experimentalCoordination flag — not production
Designed for single-session orchestration: all subagents share same process
No inter-process sharing or cross-session persistence required at this stage
Process restart resets coordination state, which is acceptable for experimental feature
consequences: State is lost on process restart
Not shared across separate OpenCode processes
If persistence needed later, migrate to JSON artifact / append-only JSONL pattern
implicit_blockers: Schema.Literal API mismatch in coordination.ts:208 — pre-existing type error
decisions.scope_notes: Session-local is intentional; not a defect
